defs: Of or relating to modern Greece, and especially to its language.
The modern Greek language, now usually called by the Greeks Hellenic or Neo-Hellenic.
notes: ☞ The Greeks at the time of the capture of Constantinople were proud of being "Romai^oi, or Romans . . . Hence the term Romaic was the name given to the popular language. . . . The Greek language is now spoken of as the Hellenic language.
